LanguageData.SolarFlareActive.label: solar flare
LanguageData.AnomalyGrayFleshEvidence.label: gray flesh evidence
LanguageData.AnomalyGrayFleshEvidence.instruction: write this as unresolved colony unease grounded only in the gray flesh the pawn can actually see; carry quiet suspicion into ordinary details and never name hidden game mechanics beyond the supplied evidence
LanguageData.MetalhorrorEmergence.label: metalhorror emergence
